name: Containment Research Concord
summary: Sheresh research bloc coordinating contamination measurement, shield experimentation, and controlled study of dangerous outer conditions.
motive: Understand and survive magical contamination without letting inquiry endanger the domes.
power_relations: Shares authority with Dome Stewards and route wardens
Often pushes against stricter safety-first administrators
visible_membership_base: Researchers, field samplers, ward technicians, and archive keepers.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: Its work is indispensable, but every failure feeds public fear that curiosity is consuming safety.
